invariants.text: forall p: int {:trigger a[p]} {:trigger arr[p]} :: 0 <= p < i ==> arr[p] == a[p]
forall p: int, q: int {:trigger arr[q], arr[p]} :: 0 <= p < q < j ==> arr[p] <= arr[q]
forall p: int {:trigger pre[p]} {:trigger arr[p]} :: 0 <= p <= k ==> arr[p] == pre[p]
forall p: int {:trigger arr[p]} :: k + 2 <= p <= j ==> arr[p] == pre[p - 1]
forall p: int {:trigger pre[p]} {:trigger arr[p]} :: j + 1 <= p < n ==> arr[p] == pre[p]
forall p: int, q: int {:trigger arr[q], arr[p]} :: 0 <= p < q <= k ==> arr[p] <= arr[q]
forall p: int {:trigger arr[p]} :: k + 2 <= p <= j ==> arr[p] > key
forall p: int, q: int {:trigger arr[q], arr[p]} :: k + 2 <= p < q <= j ==> arr[p] <= arr[q]
k >= 0 ==> forall p: int {:trigger arr[p]} :: k + 2 <= p <= j ==> arr[k] <= arr[p]

assertions.text: forall p: int {:trigger a[p]} {:trigger arr[p]} :: 0 <= p < n ==> arr[p] == a[p]
forall p: int, q: int {:trigger arr[q], arr[p]} :: 0 <= p < q <= j ==> arr[p] <= arr[q]
